creator: supraexpress@globaleyes.net
text:
jahshaka-1.9a9_2 (09/22/2007) still exhibits the same problem:

1) compile and install
2) run "jahshaka"
3) message about "preferences OK"
4) program immediately exits

In essence - nothing happens.

While a prebuilt package on a particular system may work, the Ports
source application does NOT.
